title: lomatium filicinum
intro: Lomatium filicinum, also known as Fernleaf Biscuitroot or Lomatium, is a perennial plant native to the dry regions of the Pacific Northwest in North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial actions. The health benefits of Lomatium filicinum include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried root, which is then used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
